flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Treasure Valley Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (928 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Treasure Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Treasure Valley Community College rose 55% between 2006 and 2009 (8.6% → 13.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Treasure Valley Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (49.3% → 58.4%).
